steps.title: For detailed protocol steps, please see below
steps.instruction: For detailed protocol steps, please see below. The trash will be used as a waste reservoir for supernatant removal. This protocol is for full plates (96 samples) exclusively. Well 11 of the reservoir will be used for pooled samples.

steps.title: To each of the well of...
steps.instruction: To each of the well of the 96-well plate, add 1 μl of uniquely indexed oligo-dT (25 μM).

steps.title: Incubate at 72 oC for 10...
steps.instruction: Incubate at 72 oC for 10 min and place the plate on ice.

steps.title: To each well, add 2 μl Smart-seq3 RT mix (62
steps.instruction: To each well, add 2 μl Smart-seq3 RT mix (62.5 mM Tris-HCl (pH8.3), 75 mM NaCl, 6.25 mM MaCl2, 2.5 mM GTP, 20 mM DTT, 1.25 U/ μl RNase inhibitor, 5 U/ μl Maxima H-minus RT enzyme).

substeps.instruction: To each well, add 2 μl Smart-seq3 RT mix (
U/ μl RNase inhibitor, 5 U/ μl Maxima H-minus RT enzyme).

steps.title: Incubate plate in a thermo cycler (off deck)
steps.instruction: Incubate plate in a thermo cycler (off deck).

steps.title: After reaction, add 60 μl of...
steps.instruction: After reaction, add 60 μl of wash-resuspension buffer into each well.

steps.title: Pool all wells into one reagent reservoir column by column
steps.instruction: Pool all wells into one reagent reservoir column by column. Wash the first 8-well column with 100μl of wash-resuspension buffer. Pipette up and down. Dispense 50 μl of cell suspension to the reagent reservoir. Transfer the remaining volume ( ~ 100 μl ) from the previous well to the well in the next column.

steps.title: For the last column, transfer the...
steps.instruction: For the last column, transfer the entire volume to the reagent reservoir.

steps.title: Repeat steps 6-7 for an additional two times
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 6-7 for an additional two times.

steps.title: Transfer the cell suspension mixture from...
steps.instruction: Transfer the cell suspension mixture from the reagent reservoir to a 2 ml LoBind tube.

steps.title: Spin cell down at 800g for 6 min
steps.instruction: Spin cell down at 800g for 6 min.

steps.title: Wash cells once with 500 μl of PBS+0
steps.instruction: Wash cells once with 500 μl of PBS+0.04%BSA. Spin cell down at 800g for 6 min. Aspirate supernatant.

steps.title: Measure the residual liquid volume in the epp tube
steps.instruction: Measure the residual liquid volume in the epp tube. Resuspend cells with the residual volume and transfer all solution into one tube of a 8-tube strip. Wash the epp tube with (80– residual volume) μl of PBS+0.04%BSA buffer and transfer all liquid into the same tube in the 8-tube strip.
